response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video. It is a dialogue-only video featuring VTubers Kobo, Kaela, and Zeta discussing their concert. I carefully listened to the entire audio track and confirmed there is no vocal music present, only faint background instrumental music. Therefore, 'contains_vocal_music' is set to false for all scenes.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Zeta from hololive Indonesia having a conversation about their concert 'Chromatic Future'. There is no vocal music present in the video, only background instrumental music.

scenes.description: Kobo, Kaela, and Zeta are dancing and talking as an introduction.
The trio discusses the concert title 'Chromatic Future' and the Hololive Indonesia 5th anniversary.
The members talk about promoting the concert on social media and thank their sponsors.
The trio concludes the discussion about their concert performance and their new models.
